creator: ryan@sasknow.com
text:
Alex Zbyslaw wrote to freebsd-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.ORG:

> Both with a GENERIC or a cut-down kernel, A Netgear FA311 Rev B1
> is not working properly.
>
> The sis driver recognises that the card exists, but fails
> initialisation.
>
> The output at boot time is
> 	sis0: <NatSemi DP83815 10/100BaseTX at device 15.0 on pci0
> 	sis0: couldn't map ports/memory

Sounds like you need to turn off Plug and Play OS in the computer's
BIOS. This PR can probably be closed.

- Ryan
